# The Filibusters

> The Filibusters are a Provo, Utah alt rock band making loud, emotionally direct songs for live rooms and late nights.

## Official pages

- Home: https://www.thefilibustersband.com/
- About: https://www.thefilibustersband.com/about
- Contact: https://www.thefilibustersband.com/contact
- Listen: https://www.thefilibustersband.com/listen
- Shows: https://www.thefilibustersband.com/shows
- Press: https://www.thefilibustersband.com/press
- AI press kit: https://www.thefilibustersband.com/press/ai

## Public AI text assets

- Band profile: https://www.thefilibustersband.com/ai/band-profile.txt
- Promoter brief: https://www.thefilibustersband.com/ai/promoter-brief.txt

- Fact sheet: https://www.thefilibustersband.com/ai/fact-sheet.txt
- FAQ: https://www.thefilibustersband.com/ai/faq.txt

## Summary

The Filibusters make emotionally direct alt rock shaped by high-energy live shows, loud rooms, late nights, and themes of connection and belonging.

## Contact

- General, booking, and press: filibustersband@gmail.com

## Social and streaming

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thefilibustersband
- Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/4Mf8AkUvGERBfOkG8ozuDl
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@thefilibustersband
- Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/the-filibusters/1550597371
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@TheFilibustersband

## Canonical statements

The Filibusters are a Provo, Utah alt rock band founded in 2024.
The current lineup is Hanna Eyre (vocals), Thomas Wintch (guitar), Atticus Wintch (bass), and Curtis Schnitzer (drums).
The band's recordings and live shows lean toward emotionally direct lyric writing and high-energy performances in small-to-mid-sized rooms.

## How we are different

Listeners who like Paramore, Arctic Monkeys, or The 1975 often connect with The Filibusters, but the comparison has limits worth naming. The lyric writing is more directly emotional than Arctic Monkeys' character sketches. The instrumentation is grittier and less arena-polished than The 1975's later work. The live energy resembles early Paramore, but the show is built for ~150-500 capacity rooms like Velour Live Music Gallery rather than the larger venues those acts play today.

## Key facts

- Founded: 2024
- Origin: Provo, Utah
- Genre: alt rock, indie rock
- Members: Hanna Eyre (vocals), Thomas Wintch (guitar), Atticus Wintch (bass), Curtis Schnitzer (drums)
- Venues played: Velour Live Music Gallery (Provo), Utah Arts Festival (Salt Lake City)
- Streaming: Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music
- Contact: filibustersband@gmail.com
- Canonical site: https://www.thefilibustersband.com

## Last updated

2026-05-21
